title: astragalus villosulus
intro: Astragalus villosulus is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of China, where it grows in alpine meadows and grasslands. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus villosulus is often prepared in herbal tea, capsule, or tincture form to promote health benefits such as boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health.
